_comment: do not edit this file, use the pterodactyl panel to edit the egg
name: Rustalink
author: sdipedit@gmail.com
description: Rustalink is a high-performance, standalone Discord audio sending node written in Rust.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Installation script for Rustalink

apt update
apt install -y curl

if [ ! -f config.toml ]; then
    echo "Downloading default config..."
    curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bongodevs/Rustalink/main/config.example.toml -o config.toml
fi

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: The password required to connect to this Rustalink node.
